• Creates a procedurally‑generated 2‑D mining world with custom textures, day/night cycle, and HUD gauges.
  • Implements client‑server sync, host election, admin controls, chat, shop, inventory, explosives and teleporters.
  • Adds a modular modal system (prompt/alert/confirm/form/trade) and a compact UI for mobile/desktop.
    const Game = new GameEngine();
    Sound.init();

This code builds a lightweight multiplayer mining game where players navigate a tiled map, mine resources, build structures and trade items. The engine handles rendering, physics, networking, and UI (including a flexible modal system) while supporting mobile controls, custom textures and persistent player stats.
